dialogueChunks.intro: Look around you, {player_name}. Everything you see? We built this.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The forge is producing at full capacity. Three settlements have placed orders. {target_npc} came by this morning: not to threaten, but to negotiate. They finally see that fighting me is more expensive than working with me. I offered them a partnership. A small one, mind you, but enough to keep the peace. The {quest_item} you gathered made all of this possible.
dialogueChunks.outro: You backed the right horse, {player_name}. Here's your share. And there'll be more where that came from.

playerResponses.text: A good outcome for everyone. I'll take my share gladly.
Just remember who made this possible when you're counting your profits.
Profit and peace. Not bad for a day's work.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}. I owe you an honest word, and I always pay my debts.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I got what I wanted. The trade routes, the contracts, the influence. But it cost more than I planned. {target_npc} won't speak to me anymore, and half the settlement looks at me differently. I tell myself it was necessary: that {location} is stronger now because someone had the spine to act. And it is stronger. But some mornings I wonder if the old way was really so bad.
dialogueChunks.outro: Here. Your payment, as promised. You earned every piece of it. And if I'm honest, you might be the only person left who doesn't resent me for what we did.

playerResponses.text: Power always comes with a price. You knew that going in.
Maybe rebuild some bridges while you still can.

dialogueChunks.intro: Well, {player_name}. We did it. The question is: was it worth it?
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The settlement is thriving. New trade, new wealth, new construction. {target_npc} even admitted that the old way wasn't working. But I notice people step aside when I walk past now. Not out of respect: out of caution. I wanted to be a leader, and instead I became someone people are careful around. The {quest_item} bought me everything I asked for and something I didn't: a very particular kind of loneliness.
dialogueChunks.outro: Take your reward, {player_name}. You were the best partner a schemer could ask for. I hope you spend it somewhere warm.

playerResponses.text: Loneliness is the toll of ambition. Spend your gains wisely.
You got what you wanted. Most people never even get that.
Maybe use some of that wealth to earn back what you lost.
